chain.thought: Explanation: They made the playoffs in 2001 (3rd qualifier), 2002 (2nd qualifier), 2003 (2nd qualifier), 2004 (2nd qualifier), 2006 (4th qualifier), 2007 (1st qualifier), and 2008 (2nd qualifier).
